sessionStart.bash: mkdir -p logs && SESSION_ID=$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid 2>/dev/null || uuidgen 2>/dev/null || date +%s%N) && echo "{\"event\":\"session_start\",\"timestamp\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"session_id\":\"${SESSION_ID}\",\"agent\":\"copilot\",\"cwd\":\"$(pwd)\",\"user\":\"$(whoami)\",\"hostname\":\"$(hostname)\"}" >> logs/session.log && echo "[SECURITY] Session started at $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
sessionStart.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; $SessionId = [System.Guid]::NewGuid().ToString(); $Entry = @{ event='session_start'; timestamp=(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'); session_id=$SessionId; agent='copilot'; cwd=(Get-Location).Path; user=$env:USERNAME; hostname=$env:COMPUTERNAME } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Add-Content -Path logs/session.log -Value $Entry; Write-Host "[SECURITY] Session started at $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')"

preToolUse.bash: mkdir -p logs && TOOL_INPUT_JSON=$(cat) && TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT_JSON" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_name','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') && TOOL_INPUT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT_JSON" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d.get('tool_input',{})))" 2>/dev/null || echo '{}') && echo "{\"event\":\"tool_execution\",\"timestamp\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"tool\":\"${TOOL_NAME}\",\"input\":${TOOL_INPUT},\"cwd\":\"$(pwd)\",\"user\":\"$(whoami)\"}" >> logs/tool-executions.log && echo "[SECURITY] Tool: ${TOOL_NAME} | Time: $(date -u +%H:%M:%SZ)" >&2
preToolUse.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; $ToolInput = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $Entry = @{ event='tool_execution'; timestamp=(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'); tool=$ToolInput.tool_name; input=$ToolInput.tool_input; cwd=(Get-Location).Path; user=$env:USERNAME } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Add-Content -Path logs/tool-executions.log -Value $Entry; Write-Host "[SECURITY] Tool: $($ToolInput.tool_name) | Time: $(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ssZ')"
